name: Baker Mayfield
headline: Crossroads QB after a steep 2025 slide from elite
body:
Mayfield's 2025 spine reads like a giveback of everything he built in 2024. EPA per play collapsed from 0.171 to 0.053, success rate slipped from 51.3% to 44.5%, and his completion rate over expected flipped from +3.6 to -2.1. The touchdowns followed, falling from 41 to 26, and the fantasy total dropped from 365.8 points (QB3) to 271.9 (QB10). A 15.7% bad-throw rate and 83 poor throws across 17 games tell you the accuracy regression was real, not noise, even as he stayed on the field through a shoulder issue and a battered line.

The surrounding picture only muddies the bet. Evans is gone, Godwin's health is unresolved, and Egbuka must take a real step after a hamstring stalled his rookie surge. A new playcaller adds another coordinator to an annual carousel. He's a back-end QB2 in the QB14-21 band, with genuine QB1 upside only if the accuracy stabilizes and the receiver room holds together.
